title: SAKMEO Benthic Cover and Reef Fish Visual Census Surveys
abstract: Site-level benthic photo-quadrat and fish visual census surveys collected by the Saudi Aramco-KAUST Marine Environmental Observatory (SAKMEO) at fixed monitoring stations along the central Red Sea coast, tracking coral cover, algal cover, and reef fish community structure over time.

variables.name: hard_coral_pct
variables.label: Hard Coral Cover
variables.description: Percent cover of live hard coral estimated from CPCe point-count analysis of quadrat photos.

variables.name: macroalgae_pct
variables.label: Macroalgae Cover
variables.description: Percent cover of fleshy macroalgae, an indicator of reef phase-shift risk.

variables.name: fish_biomass
variables.label: Reef Fish Biomass
variables.description: Estimated standing biomass of reef fish from belt-transect visual census, length-weight converted.

access.how_to_request: Available to KAUST-affiliated researchers via DataWaha login; external collaborators require a signed data-sharing agreement with SAKMEO.

provenance.citation: SAKMEO Monitoring Program. 2026. Benthic and Reef Fish Survey Time Series, Central Red Sea. KAUST.

known_issues: 2020 survey round incomplete due to COVID-19 field access restrictions.
